notes: In-Feed Video Ads (formerly Video Discovery Ads) appear in YouTube feed placements. The source page is a general campaign creation guide; it notes that in-feed ads support a 'Long headline' and 'Description' as creative options specific to the format, but does not specify character limits. No video duration, file type, size, or dimension requirements are stated for this format on this page. Available under Video Views, Drive Conversions, and Video Reach (Efficient Reach) campaign subtypes.
